'''Karatha''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] that was the location of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] base [[Eyrie Base]]. The Eyrie was located in a natural [[Sinkhole/Legends|sinkhole]] on the surface of Karatha.

{{Planet-stub}}
